member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.HttpClientBuilderExtensions

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.HttpClientBuilderExtensions.ConfigureRetry(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,System.Action{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.RetryOptions})
member.summary: Configures retry behavior using built-in .NET retry mechanisms. For advanced scenarios, consider using Polly via AddPolicyHandler.
member.param: The HttpClient builder.
Optional delegate to configure retry options.
member.remarks: For more advanced resilience patterns (circuit breaker, bulkhead, etc.), install Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Polly and use AddPolicyHandler.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.HttpClientBuilderExtensions.WithTimeout(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the default timeout for HTTP operations.
member.param: The HttpClient builder.
The timeout duration.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.RetryOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring retry behavior.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.RetryOptions.MaxRetryAttempts
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of retry attempts. Defaults to 3.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.RetryOptions.RetryDelaySeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial delay between retries in seconds. Defaults to 2 seconds.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.RetryOptions.UseExponentialBackoff
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to use exponential backoff. Defaults to true.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.RetryOptions.MaxJitterMilliseconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum jitter to add to retry delays in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable jitter. Defaults to 1000ms.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.StreamingExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with streaming responses.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.StreamingExtensions.Subscribe(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessageUpdate},System.Action{System.String},System.Action,System.Action{System.Exception},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribes to a streaming response using callbacks. Useful for UI frameworks where event-based patterns are preferred.
member.param: The async enumerable stream.
Callback for each update (delta content).
Optional callback when streaming completes.
Optional callback for errors.
A token to cancel the subscription.
member.returns: A task that completes when streaming finishes.

example.code: await client.SendMessageStreamingAsync(sessionId, "Hello") .Subscribe( onUpdate: delta => Console.Write(delta), onComplete: () => Console.WriteLine("\nDone!"), onError: ex => Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}"));

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.StreamingExtensions.SubscribeWithProgress(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessageUpdate},System.Action{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.StreamingProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribes to a streaming response with detailed progress information.
member.param: The async enumerable stream.
Callback for each update with full details.
A token to cancel the subscription.
member.returns: A task that completes when streaming finishes.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.StreamingExtensions.ToStringAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessageUpdate},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Collects all streaming updates into a single string.
member.param: The async enumerable stream.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Extensions.StreamingExtensions.ToListAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessageUpdate},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Collects all streaming updates into a list of updates.
member.param: The async enumerable stream.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.IOpenCodeClient
member.summary: Interface for the OpenCode client, providing access to all OpenCode server operations.

remarks.para: This interface defines the contract for communicating with an OpenCode server running locally via opencode serve. It provides session management, message handling, tool operations, file access, and configuration retrieval.
Implementations should be thread-safe and support concurrent operations.

member.exception: Thrown when the server cannot be reached.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClient
member.summary: Client for communicating with an OpenCode server.

remarks.para: This client provides access to all OpenCode server operations including session management, message handling, tool operations, file access, and configuration retrieval.
The client is thread-safe and can be used for concurrent operations. For best performance in DI scenarios, use IHttpClientFactory to manage HttpClient lifetime.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClient.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default options.
member.remarks: Uses the default base URL http://localhost:9123.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom base URL.
member.param: The base URL of the OpenCode server.

member.param: The client configuration options.
Optional logger for diagnostics.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with an existing HttpClient.
member.param: The HttpClient to use for requests.
Optional client configuration options.
Optional logger for diagnostics.
member.remarks: When using this constructor, the HttpClient is not owned by this instance and will not be disposed when this client is disposed.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: F:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.DefaultBaseUrl
member.summary: Default base URL for the OpenCode server.

member.name: F:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.DefaultQuickTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout for quick operations (list, get, delete).

member.name: F:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.DefaultMessageTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout for message operations (AI responses).

member.name: F:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.DefaultMaxRetryAttempts
member.summary: Default maximum number of retry attempts for transient failures.

member.name: F:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.DefaultRetryDelaySeconds
member.summary: Default delay between retry attempts in seconds.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL of the OpenCode server. Defaults to http://localhost:9123.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.Directory
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional working directory for the OpenCode server. When set, this directory is used as the context for file operations.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.DefaultTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the default timeout for quick operations (list, get, delete). Defaults to 30 seconds.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.MessageTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout for message operations that involve AI responses. Defaults to 5 minutes.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.EnableRetry
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable automatic retry for transient failures. Defaults to true.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.MaxRetryAttempts
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of retry attempts for transient failures. Defaults to 3.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.RetryDelaySeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the delay between retry attempts in seconds. Uses exponential backoff starting from this value. Defaults to 2 seconds.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.EnableTelemetry
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable OpenTelemetry tracing. Defaults to true (tracing is enabled if there are listeners).

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.ValidateOnStart
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to validate options on startup. Defaults to true.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptions.ValidateBaseUrl
member.summary: Validates that the is a valid URI.
member.returns: true if the base URL is valid; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.OpenCodeClientOptionsValidator
